title: stillingia indica
intro: Stillingia indica, also known as Queen's Root, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the family Stilingiaceae. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Stillingia indica include relieving pain and inflammation, reducing fever, and treating conditions such as rheumatism, gout, and skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Stillingia indica typically involve drying the roots and leaves, then using them to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
